name: Vomit on them
description: You're a baby. It happens.
logMessage: You vomited on {npc}. {npc_subject} cleaned up and still love you.

name: Make cute baby faces
description: Gurgle, grin, and make them melt.
logMessage: You made the cutest faces and {npc_subject} couldn't get enough.

name: Smile and coo at them
description: Light up when you see them and babble happily.
logMessage: You smiled and cooed at {npc}. {npc_possessive} heart melted.

name: Reach out for a cuddle
description: Stretch your arms toward them wanting to be held.
logMessage: You reached out for a cuddle and {npc_subject} held you close.

name: Fall asleep on them
description: Doze off in their arms or on their shoulder.
logMessage: You fell asleep on {npc}. {npc_subject} didn't dare move.

name: Throw a tantrum
description: Scream, cry, and flail when you don't get your way.
logMessage: You threw a tantrum. {npc_subject} waited it out.

name: Cry until they pick you up
description: You want to be held. You make it known.
logMessage: You cried until {npc_subject} picked you up. It worked.

name: Draw a picture for them
description: Make a drawing or craft and give it to them.
logMessage: You drew a picture for {npc} and {npc_subject} put it on the fridge.

name: Give them a big hug
description: Run up and hug them for no reason.
logMessage: You gave {npc} a big hug. {npc_subject} hugged you back.

name: Say "I love you"
description: Tell them you love them out of the blue.
logMessage: You told {npc} you love {npc}. {npc_subject} won't forget it.

name: Share your toy with them
description: Let them play with your favourite thing.
logMessage: You shared your toy with {npc}. It meant a lot.

name: Refuse to share
description: It's yours and you're not sharing. No.
logMessage: You refused to share. There were tears.

name: Make them a handmade card
description: Fold paper, add drawings and a message, and give it to them.
logMessage: You made {npc} a handmade card. {npc_subject} kept it.

name: Invite them to play
description: Ask them to play a game or do an activity with you.
logMessage: You invited {npc} to play and you had fun together.

name: Play and explore
description: Spend time playing, babbling, or exploring on your own.
logMessage: You played and explored. It was a good day.

name: Host a dinner party with...
description: Invite people over for a home-cooked meal and good conversation.
logMessage: You hosted a dinner party, bringing people together over a warm meal and laughter.

name: Go partying with...
description: Spend your weekends going out to bars, restaurants, and events with friends.
logMessage: You spent your weekends going out, making memories and strengthening bonds.

name: Stay in touch regularly
description: Send thoughtful messages and check in on people throughout the year.
logMessage: You made an effort to stay in touch, sending messages and checking in regularly.

name: Volunteer with...
description: Sign up for volunteer work together, helping the community side by side.
logMessage: You volunteered together, building a deeper bond through shared purpose.

name: Give a thoughtful gift
description: Pick out something special that shows you really know the person.
logMessage: You surprised {npc} with a thoughtful gift that showed how well you know {npc}.

name: Be there in hard times
description: Offer emotional support during a difficult period in their life.
logMessage: You were there when {npc_subject} needed someone most, listening and offering support.

name: Exercise with...
description: Work out, run, or play sports together on a regular basis.
logMessage: You exercised together regularly, sharing sweat and motivation.

name: Study or learn with...
description: Spend time studying, reading, or learning something new together.
logMessage: You spent time learning together, growing your minds side by side.

name: Ghost everyone
description: Stop responding to messages and avoid social contact for a while.
logMessage: You disappeared from everyone's life for a while, leaving them wondering what happened.

name: Volunteer
description: Spend time volunteering in your community on your own.
logMessage: You volunteered in your community, giving back without expecting anything in return.

name: Go out partying
description: Head out to bars, events, or nightlife on your own and meet new people.
logMessage: You went out partying and had a night to remember.

name: Go on a picnic with...
description: Pack a basket and enjoy a relaxed outdoor meal together.
logMessage: You went on a picnic together, sharing food and conversation under the open sky.

name: Spread gossip
description: Share rumors and private information about someone behind their back.
logMessage: You spread gossip about {npc}, and word got back to places you didn't expect.

name: Cancel plans last minute
description: Bail on plans you made, leaving people disappointed.
logMessage: You cancelled plans at the last minute, leaving {npc} hanging.

name: Be passive-aggressive
description: Express your frustration through indirect comments and subtle digs.
logMessage: You made cutting remarks and gave the cold shoulder instead of talking things out.

name: Take credit for their work
description: Claim someone else's ideas or contributions as your own.
logMessage: You took credit for {npc_possessive} work, and {npc_subject} found out about it.

name: Manipulate for personal gain
description: Use the relationship to get something you want without regard for their feelings.
logMessage: You manipulated the relationship to serve your own interests.

name: Plan a weekend trip
description: Organize a weekend getaway together to explore somewhere new.
logMessage: You went on a weekend trip together, creating shared memories in a new place.

name: Have a heart-to-heart
description: Sit down for a deep, honest conversation about life and feelings.
logMessage: You had a deep conversation that brought you closer together.

name: Lend them money
description: Help them out financially when they're in a tough spot.
logMessage: You lent {npc} money when {npc_subject} needed it, showing you trusted and cared for {npc}.

name: Compete with them
description: Turn everything into a competition, always trying to one-up them.
logMessage: You turned your friendship into a constant competition, and the tension grew.

name: Betray a confidence
description: Share something they told you in private with other people.
logMessage: You betrayed {npc_possessive} confidence, and the trust between you was shattered.

name: Plan a romantic date
description: Organize a special evening together with attention to every detail.
logMessage: You planned a beautiful date that left both of you smiling.

name: Move in together
description: Take the big step of sharing a living space.
logMessage: You moved in together, starting a new chapter of your relationship.

name: Propose
description: Pop the question and ask them to spend the rest of their life with you.
logMessage: You got down on one knee and proposed. {npc_subject} said yes!

name: Get married
description: Tie the knot in a ceremony celebrating your love.
logMessage: You got married in a ceremony surrounded by the people you love.

name: Neglect the relationship
description: Stop putting effort into the relationship and take your partner for granted.
logMessage: You stopped making an effort, and the distance between you and {npc} grew.

name: Be unfaithful
description: Pursue someone else while in a committed relationship.
logMessage: You were unfaithful, and the betrayal left deep scars.

name: Plan a surprise getaway
description: Whisk them away on a surprise trip to rekindle the spark.
logMessage: You surprised {npc} with a getaway trip, rekindling the romance.

name: Help with family responsibilities
description: Take on more chores and responsibilities around the home.
logMessage: You stepped up and helped with family responsibilities around the home.

name: Family road trip
description: Go on a road trip with the family to explore and bond.
logMessage: You went on a family road trip full of adventure and togetherness.

name: Cut contact
description: Stop communicating with a family member entirely.
logMessage: You cut contact with a family member, creating a painful silence.

name: Celebrate milestones together
description: Make an effort to be present for birthdays, holidays, and important moments.
logMessage: You celebrated important milestones together, strengthening the family bond.

name: Start a family argument
description: Let tensions boil over into a heated argument at a family gathering.
logMessage: A heated argument erupted, leaving everyone feeling hurt and drained.

name: Collaborate on a project
description: Work together on a side project or initiative beyond your regular duties.
logMessage: You collaborated on a project together, earning mutual respect.

name: Undermine at work
description: Sabotage their work or reputation in the workplace.
logMessage: You undermined {npc_possessive} work behind {npc_possessive} back, damaging the relationship.

name: Mentor or help with work
description: Share your knowledge and help them grow professionally.
logMessage: You mentored {npc}, sharing your knowledge and helping {npc_subject} grow.

name: Have lunch together regularly
description: Make a habit of sharing lunch breaks to chat and unwind.
logMessage: You shared regular lunches, building a comfortable rapport.

name: Steal their opportunity
description: Snag a client, promotion, or opportunity that they were working toward.
logMessage: You swiped an opportunity right from under {npc}, and {npc_subject} noticed.

name: Sincerely apologize
description: Own up to your mistakes and make a genuine apology.
logMessage: You sincerely apologized, and it helped mend what was broken.

name: Cook for them regularly
description: Show your care by preparing meals for them throughout the year.
logMessage: You cooked for {npc} regularly, and {npc_subject} appreciated every meal.

name: Ignore their needs
description: Be self-centered and dismiss what they need from the relationship.
logMessage: You ignored {npc_possessive} needs, focused entirely on yourself.

name: Share a hobby together
description: Pick up a shared hobby or activity to enjoy on a regular basis.
logMessage: You discovered a shared hobby that gave you something meaningful to bond over.

name: Lie to them
description: Tell a significant lie to avoid consequences or gain an advantage.
logMessage: You told {npc} a lie, and the truth felt heavier for it.

name: Defend their reputation
description: Stand up for them when others speak badly about them.
logMessage: You stood up for {npc} when others talked behind {npc_possessive} back.

name: Act jealous and possessive
description: Let jealousy take over and try to control who they spend time with.
logMessage: You let jealousy take over, causing tension and arguments.

name: Introduce to your circle
description: Bring them into your social circle and introduce them to your friends.
logMessage: You introduced {npc} to your friends, weaving your social worlds together.

name: Humiliate in public
description: Embarrass them in front of others, whether intentionally or through carelessness.
logMessage: You humiliated {npc} in public, and the damage was hard to undo.

name: Write a love letter
description: Pour your feelings into a heartfelt letter expressing your love.
logMessage: You wrote a heartfelt love letter that moved {npc} deeply.

name: Flirt with others openly
description: Flirt with other people in front of your partner.
logMessage: You flirted openly with others, making your partner feel invisible.

name: Support their education
description: Help a family member with their studies or career development.
logMessage: You helped {npc} with {npc_possessive} education, investing in {npc_possessive} future.

name: Neglect elderly relatives
description: Stop visiting or calling older family members who need your attention.
logMessage: You stopped visiting your elderly relatives, and {npc_subject} felt abandoned.

name: Open up about your feelings
description: Be vulnerable and share what you're really going through.
logMessage: You opened up about your feelings, and {npc_subject} listened with care.

name: Refuse to help when asked
description: Say no when they reach out for help, even though you could easily assist.
logMessage: You refused to help when {npc_subject} needed you, and it stung.
